messages.content:
怎么让这两个表一样宽：\begin{table*}
\centering
\caption{Comparison of our proposed method with the fully-supervised and zero-shot methods on the PNG benchmark.\ydn{@zhiyi所有文献加一下引用}}
\label{tab:png_benchmark}
\begin{tabular}{lllc ccccc}
\toprule
\multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Method}} & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Visual Encoder}} & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Language Model}} &
\multicolumn{5}{c}{\textbf{Segmentation Average Recall(\%)}}  \\
\cmidrule(lr){4-8}
&  &  & \textbf{Overall} & \textbf{Singular} & \textbf{Plural} & \textbf{Thing} & \textbf{Stuff} \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{8}{l}{\textbf{Fully-Supervised}} \\
\midrule
PNG~\cite{gonzalez2021panoptic}     & RN-101 & BERT & 55.4 & 56.2 & 48.8 & 56.2 & 54.3 \\
PPMN~\cite{ding2022ppmn}        & RN-101 & BERT & 59.4 & 60.0 & 54.0 & 57.2 & 62.5 \\
MCN~\cite{luo2020multi}          & RN-101 & GRU  & 54.2 & 56.6 & 38.8 & 48.6 & 61.4 \\
EPNG~\cite{guo2024improving}         & RN-101 & BERT & 58.0 & 58.6 & 52.1 & 54.8 & 62.4 \\
DRMN~\cite{}        & RN-101 & BERT & 62.9 & 63.6 & 56.7 & 60.3 & 66.4 \\
PPO-TD~\cite{}      & RN-50  & BERT & 66.1 & 69.1 & 58.3 & 64.0 & 70.7 \\
PiGLET~\cite{}    & SWIN-L & BERT & 65.9 & 67.2 & 54.5 & 64.0 & 68.6 \\
NICE~\cite{}        & RN-101 & BERT & 62.3 & 63.1 & 55.2 & 60.2 & 65.3 \\
XPNG~\cite{}         & RN-101 & BERT & 63.3 & 64.0 & 56.4 & 61.1 & 66.2 \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{8}{l}{\textbf{Zero-Shot}} \\
\midrule
Random                   & --     & --    & 15.53 & 15.76 & 13.47 & 11.90 & 20.58 \\
DatasetDiffusion~\cite{} & UNET & CLIP & 23.46 & 24.26 & 16.03 & 15.99 & 33.83 \\
DiffSeg~\cite{}   & UNET   & CLIP & 24.08 & 24.75 & 18.02 & 17.69 & 32.95 \\
\midrule
DiffPNG (ours)           & UNET   & CLIP & 33.54 & 34.05 & 28.93 & 29.79 & 38.74 \\
DiffPNG* (ours)          & UNET   & CLIP & \textbf{38.49} & \textbf{39.18} & \textbf{32.14} & \textbf{35.95} & \textbf{42.00} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table*}
\begin{table*}[t]
\centering
\caption{COMPARISON OF OUR PROPOSED METHOD WITH THE FULLY-SUPERVISED AND ZERO-SHOT METHODS ON THE Ref-Davis17 BENCHMARK\ydn{@zhiyi所有文献加一下引用}}
\label{tab:refdavis17}
\begin{tabular}{l l l c c c}
\toprule
\textbf{Method} & \textbf{Visual Encoder} & \textbf{Language Encoder} & \textbf{J Mean} $\uparrow$ & \textbf{F Mean} $\uparrow$ & \textbf{J\&F Mean} $\uparrow$ \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{6}{c}{\textit{Fully-Supervised Referring VOS}} \\
\midrule
URVOS & ResNet-50 & LSTM & 60.9 & 64.7 & 62.8 \\
CMPC-V & ResNet-101 & GRU & 59.4 & 63.6 & 61.5 \\
MAttNet-VOS & ResNet-101 & LSTM & 58.6 & 62.8 & 60.7 \\
LAVT & Swin-B & BERT & 60.4 & 63.8 & 62.1 \\
ReferFormer & Swin-L & Transformer & 61.8 & 65.2 & \textbf{63.5} \\
OnlineRefer & Swin-B & BERT & 59.9 & 63.9 & 61.9 \\
\midrule
\multicolumn{6}{c}{\textit{Open-Vocabulary / Zero-Shot Referring VOS}} \\
\midrule
CLIPSeg-V & CLIP-ViT & CLIP Text & 49.3 & 53.1 & 51.2 \\
ReferDiff & ViT & T5 & 52.1 & 56.5 & 54.3 \\
Video-LLaMA-Ref & Swin-T & LLaMA & 43.8 & 47.4 & 45.6 \\
Uni-GroundDiff  & SD_v1.4 & CLIP Text & 55.82 & 63.51 & 59.67 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table*}

让两个 `table*` 一样宽，最稳的方法是**都把 `tabular` 的宽度强制设为 `\textwidth`**（双栏文档里 `table*` 的宽度就是 `\textwidth`），并用 `tabularx`/`ltablex` 让列自动伸缩。

## 方法1（推荐）：`tabularx` 统一为 `\textwidth`
导言区：
```latex
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{multirow}
```

把两个表都改成这种结构（关键是 `\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{...}`），并用 `X` 列吃掉多余空间：

### 表1（8列）示例
```latex
\begin{table*}
\centering
\caption{...}
\label{tab:png_benchmark}

\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{l l l *{5}{>{\centering\arraybackslash}X}}
\toprule
\multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Method}} & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Visual Encoder}} & \multirow{2}{*}{\textbf{Language Model}} &
\multicolumn{5}{c}{\textbf{Segmentation Average Recall(\%)}}  \\
\cmidrule(lr){4-8}
&  &  & \textbf{Overall} & \textbf{Singular} & \textbf{Plural} & \textbf{Thing} & \textbf{Stuff} \\
\midrule
% ... 内容不变
\bottomrule
\end{tabularx}
\end{table*}
```

### 表2（6列）示例
```latex
\begin{table*}[t]
\centering
\caption{...}
\label{tab:refdavis17}

\begin{tabularx}{\textwidth}{l l l *{3}{>{\centering\arraybackslash}X}}
\toprule
\textbf{Method} & \textbf{Visual Encoder} & \textbf{Language Encoder} &
\textbf{J Mean} $\uparrow$ & \textbf{F Mean} $\uparrow$ & \textbf{J\&F Mean} $\uparrow$ \\
\midrule
% ... 内容不变
\bottomrule
\end{tabularx}
\end{table*}
```

这样两个表都会**强制占满同样的宽度（`\textwidth`）**，视觉上就一样宽了。

---

## 方法2：简单粗暴缩放到同一宽度（不太推荐）
如果你不想改列格式，可以：
```latex
\usepackage{graphicx} % for \resizebox
...
\resizebox{\textwidth}{!}{%
\begin{tabular}{...}
...
\end{tabular}}
```
缺点是字体会被缩放，可能变小/不一致。

---

如果你希望“前三列左对齐但自动换行、数值列固定窄宽”，我也可以按你期刊版式帮你把 `tabularx` 的列格式进一步定制（比如 `p{}` + `X` 混用）。
